block_02: Pick the best indicators for your strategy
block_03: Many traders don’t use technical analysis because they think it’s too complicated. Indeed, some technical tools may require more knowledge and experience to apply correctly. But there are also a number of basic instruments that even beginner traders can use to get accurate results.
block_04: This article covers 5 technical indicators that are effective and easy to apply. By adding them to your strategy, you can find trading opportunities and get useful insights into market trends.
block_08: Why do I need to verify my IQ Option account before making a withdrawal?
